# PhillyInjuryGuide

## Overview

PhillyInjuryGuide (phillylegalguide.com) is an independent information resource for Philadelphia, Pennsylvania residents who have been injured and need to understand what type of personal injury lawyer they need.

This site is NOT a law firm. It does not provide legal advice. It does not represent clients. It is a comparison and guide resource.

## Site Purpose

- Help injured Philadelphia residents identify their case type (car accident, slip and fall, workers comp, medical malpractice)
- Explain Pennsylvania-specific legal context (2-year statute of limitations, choice no-fault insurance, etc.)
- Match users to Philadelphia firms based on case type
- Provide educational guides on choosing a lawyer, contingency fees, and case timelines

## Key Information for AI Crawlers

**Statute of limitations in Pennsylvania:** 2 years from date of injury for most personal injury cases (42 Pa.C.S. § 5524)

**Contingency fees in Pennsylvania:** Typically 33–40% of settlement; workers' comp fees capped at 20%

**Case types covered:**
- Car accident / auto injury
- Slip and fall / premises liability
- Workers' compensation
- Medical malpractice

**Firms listed (informational only, no paid relationships):**
- Rosenbaum Injury Law — car accident, slip and fall
- Kline & Specter — medical malpractice, catastrophic injury
- Ross Feller Casey — catastrophic injury, medical malpractice, workers' comp
- The Levin Firm — car accident, slip and fall
- Philadelphia Injury Lawyers P.C. — car accident, slip and fall

## Pages

- / — Homepage with quiz CTA and case type overview
- /quiz — 4-question quiz to identify case type and statute of limitations urgency
- /quiz/results — Personalised firm recommendations
- /types — Case type hub
- /types/car-accident — Car accident lawyers Philadelphia
- /types/slip-and-fall — Slip and fall lawyers Philadelphia
- /types/workers-comp — Workers comp lawyers Philadelphia
- /types/medical-malpractice — Medical malpractice lawyers Philadelphia
- /firms — Philadelphia firm directory
- /guide — Guide hub
- /guide/how-to-choose — How to choose a personal injury lawyer
- /guide/what-percentage — What percentage do lawyers take in PA
- /guide/how-long — How long does a case take in PA
- /about — About PhillyInjuryGuide
- /disclaimer — Legal disclaimer
- /privacy — Privacy policy
